response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong overall software engineering credentials with 15+ years of experience and solid communication skills, he lacks the core technical requirements for this role. His C++ experience is minimal (1-2 years at National Instruments) versus the required 5-10 years on Windows platforms, his SQL knowledge is vague with no demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise, and critically, he has no capital markets or fixed income domain background. His career has focused on web/backend development (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than systems-level C++ programming, making this a fundamental skills mismatch.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software engineering experience demonstrating maturity and breadth across multiple domains
Strong communication and teaching abilities evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and course creation
Solid understanding of CI/CD infrastructure and DevOps from roles at Altom Consulting and other positions
concerns: Only ~1-2 years of explicit C++ development experience versus 5-10 years required; no Windows platform C++ specialization mentioned
Career trajectory focused on web/backend development (JavaScript, TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) rather than systems programming or capital markets
No capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain expertise; limited exposure to enterprise SQL databases (primarily MongoDB)

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets/fixed income domain expertise
